Title: Cross-Origin Message Origin Validation Mismatch
Forensic_Evidence: Incoming message ignored due to origin mismatch.
Remediation: Configure explicit origin verification and validate against g_concourse_onmessage_enforce_same_origin_whitelist properties instead of allowing unverified frames.

Title: Context Key Variable Displacement (Type Pollution)
Forensic_Evidence: userCountry = adobeDataLayer[0].data.loginEventDetails; // Key mismatch fallback mismatch
Remediation: Realign data mapping variables to correctly resolve and store the browser_akamai_loc_country parameter.

Title: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) Enforcement Intercept
Component: Global RPC Outbound Gateway Interface (myservices.cisa.gov -> google.com)
Forensic_Evidence: Access to fetch at google.com/complete/search from origin myservices.cisa.gov has been blocked by CORS policy
Remediation: Reroute outbound API queries through authenticated client-side proxies or register secure, origin-authorized API gateways.

Title: OpenType Layout Asset Structure Corruption
Remediation: Verify fonts are built using clean WOFF2 standard encoding sequences and validate proxy filter optimization boundaries.

Forensic_Evidence: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot set properties of undefined (setting 'encoding_gate')

Forensic_Evidence: Uncaught TypeError: Failed to execute 'setItem' on 'Storage': 2 arguments required, but only 1 present.
